exploration_notes:
All five artifacts located in the OpenJDK tree:

1. **Provider.java** (`src/java.base/share/classes/java/security/Provider.java`) — abstract class `Provider` (line 113) with inner `public static class Service` (line 1500). Key methods: `getService()` (line 1136), `getServices()` (line 1183), and `Service.newInstance()` (line 1713).

2. **Security.java** (`src/java.base/share/classes/java/security/Security.java`) — `public final class Security` (line 76) managing provider registration. Key method
